mechanics.excerpt: Zero G Operations Held down Eood part-time job [Wealth] Extra technical training [Add +1 to any two Technician Subskills] Borrowed materials from shop [Well-Equipped] Top of the class [+3 t0 ay two skills may enter University Military Academy path next] (Choose one event or roll twice ad apply both results] Subpath: DEST Tralning AIT graduates (MechWarriors and Armored Intantry only) With the possible exception House Liao' Death Commandos the Draconis Elite Strike Teams are the most feared and efficient special forces in the Inner Sphere_ Candidates are sent to the DEST Tactical Command Center on Pesht for intense training ad indoctrination; isolated from the outside world_ Teams of five soldiers train together ad graduate together to Form new strike team; these years of working together give Irem unsurpassed efficiency: Tlme: years 45
